name: Skypalace Gangaridai
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>中</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガンガリディア
desc:
2 Level 10 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy that target, and if you do, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can only use the effect of "Skypalace Gangaridai" once per turn. Cannot attack the turn you activate this effect.
